title: Reference build pipeline
description: Implementation-facing stages from project resolution through lowering to JIT or AOT backends, aligned with the Beskid compiler workspace layout.

nodes.label: Project resolution
nodes.description: Resolve Project.proj / Workspace.proj, build compile plan, materialize workspace and Project.lock when applicable.

nodes.label: Parse and validate
nodes.description: Parse Beskid source to AST; CLI may validate before lowering.

nodes.label: lower_source
nodes.description: HIR, resolution, typing, and Cranelift lowering to CodegenArtifact.

nodes.label: JIT execution
nodes.description: Compile artifact in-process and invoke entrypoint (e.g. beskid run).

nodes.label: AOT build
nodes.description: Emit object, prepare runtime archive strategy, native link (e.g. beskid build).

nodes.label: LSP diagnostics
nodes.description: Editor diagnostics path: parse or cached snapshot plus semantic rules.

edges.label: source path
edges.description: Resolved source_path and source text feed parse/validate.

edges.label: program
edges.description: lower_source parses again internally then runs full pipeline.

edges.label: context
edges.description: LSP uses workspace and manifest paths alongside buffer text.
